mapper.select: SELECT S.store_id AS storeId, S.store_nm AS storeNm, COALESCE(C.status, '01') AS status, C.crr_strt_date AS applyDate FROM crr_hstr C JOIN store_info S ON C.store_id = S.store_id WHERE C.user_id = #{userId} AND C.del_yn = false ORDER BY C.rgst_date DESC

/* selectMyApplyList */ select ai.apply_date AS applyDate , ai.apply_sts AS applySts , ai.apply_suc_yn AS applySucYn , si.store_nm AS storeNm , hb.hiring_no AS hiringNo , ccd.dtl_cd_nm as applyStsNm , ccd2.dtl_cd_nm as hiringStsNm from apply_info ai join hiring_board hb on ai.hiring_no = hb.hiring_no join store_info si on hb.store_id = si.store_id left join cmn_cd_dtl ccd on ccd.dtl_cd = ai.apply_sts and ccd.mstr_cd = 'APPLY_STS' left join cmn_cd_dtl ccd2 on ccd2.dtl_cd = hb.hiring_sts and ccd2.mstr_cd = 'HIRING_STS' where 1=1 and ai.apply_user_id = #{userId}

/* selectMyHiringList */ select si.store_nm AS storeNm , hb.hiring_no AS hiringNo , ccd2.dtl_cd_nm AS hiringStsNm , hb.work_start_date AS workStartDate , hb.work_end_date AS workEndDate from hiring_board hb join store_info si on hb.store_id = si.store_id left join cmn_cd_dtl ccd2 on ccd2.dtl_cd = hb.hiring_sts and ccd2.mstr_cd = 'HIRING_STS' where 1=1 and hb.rgst_id = #{userId}
